name: What documentation do I need for my insurance claim after water damage?

mainEntity.name: What documentation do I need for my insurance claim after water damage?

acceptedAnswer.text: You should document damage with photos, list damaged belongings, and keep receipts for cleanup or temporary repairs. Contact your insurance company to start the claim; they may send an adjuster or recommend contractors. Evidence-based reports from professionals help warrant equipment charges. Take clear photos of all affected areas and items. Documentation is essential for successful insurance claims. Don't forget to track all expenses.
acceptedAnswer.description: Take photos of damage, document all damaged belongings, keep receipts for cleanup/temporary repairs, and contact insurance immediately to start the claim process.

description: Take photos of damage, document all damaged belongings, keep receipts for cleanup/temporary repairs, and contact insurance immediately to start the claim proces
